Our Story

More Than a Cafe.
It's a Feeling.

Coffee Country was born from a simple dream — to create a space in Guwahati where nature, warmth and great coffee exist together under the open sky.

Our living canopy of vines, bamboo lanterns and warm string lights create an atmosphere unlike anything else in the city. From morning coffee to evening conversations — every moment here is unforgettable.

We have welcomed guests from across India and the world. Every table has a story. Come add yours.

🌿
Living vine canopy — nature's own ceiling
✨
String lights and bamboo lanterns every evening
🌍
International guests from 50+ countries
☕
100+ menu items — coffee, food and more
📍
Garchuk, Guwahati — open daily 11AM–10PM
Our Space

Photograph.

From the glowing exterior sign at dusk to the "ORDER HERE" neon inside — Coffee Country is built for moments that last forever.

What We Serve

A Menu as Rich
as Our Ambience.

☕
Signature Coffee
Country Cappuccino
Rich espresso with velvety steamed milk, topped with our signature cinnamon dusting.
₹130
🧋
Cold Coffee
Jungle Cold Brew
24-hour cold steeped coffee over ice with a hint of vanilla. Smooth, bold, refreshing.
₹160
🥪
All Day Breakfast
Garden Club Sandwich
Triple-decker with grilled vegetables, cream cheese and our house spread. Served with fries.
₹190
🍃
Signature Mocktail
Forest Berry Cooler
Mixed berry blend with fresh mint, lime and sparkling water. Our bestselling drink.
₹160
🍕
Mains
Wood-Style Pizza
Thin crust loaded with fresh toppings and mozzarella. Made fresh per order.
₹280
🍰
Desserts
Chocolate Lava Cake
Warm chocolate cake with a molten centre. Served with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
₹220
Why Coffee Country

An Experience
Like No Other.

🌿
Living Vine Canopy
Our ceiling is a living jungle — real vines, bamboo lanterns and hanging lights that create a magical atmosphere day and night.
✨
String Light Evenings
As the sun sets, our string lights transform the cafe into something straight out of a dream. The perfect evening setting in Guwahati.
🌍
International Guests
Visitors from across the globe choose Coffee Country as their Guwahati home. Our warmth and ambience speak every language.
🍃
Open Air Seating
Semi-outdoor dining under the canopy. Fresh air, natural light and the sound of Guwahati — a rare dining experience in the city.
☕
Freshly Brewed Always
Every cup is freshly brewed to order. We do not compromise on quality — from our espresso to our cold brew to our teas.
🎄
Seasonal Decor
We celebrate every season and festival — Christmas, Valentine's Day, Bihu. Every visit feels fresh and festive throughout the year.

Stories From Our
Community.

"The most beautiful cafe I have visited in all of Northeast India. The vine ceiling, the lights, the coffee — absolutely magical. I came back every day during my trip."
